# Safety Best Practices

> Proven patterns for read-only-first workflows, permissions gates, and protective hooks.

## Entries

- [Read-Only First Rule (RULE 0)](read-only-first-rule.md): Gather information before taking action. Read-only commands first. Modifications only with user approval. FOUNDATIONAL.
- [Permissions Pass Gate (RULE 2)](permissions-gate.md): Cryptographic verification gate for privileged Graph API permission changes. RECOMMENDED.
- [tenant-scope-ok Escape Hatch for Multi-Tenant Lint Checks](tenant-scope-ok-escape-hatch.md): Grep-able, audit-friendly escape hatch for the few routes where strict tenant-scope enforcement has a legitimate exception. RECOMMENDED.
